seoTitle: Augusta vs Australind — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Augusta and Australind. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Augusta and Australind.
heading: Augusta vs Australind — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Augusta, Western Australia and Australind, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Australind has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Augusta (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Augusta or Australind safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Augusta has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Australind scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Augusta scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Australind scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Augusta or Australind?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Australind has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
